source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Focused Firing
upgrades.description: Increases accuracy of the Dartling Gun.

upgrades.name: Laser Shock
upgrades.description: Laser tipped shots shock Bloons into popping again 1 second after being struck.

upgrades.name: Laser Cannon
upgrades.description: Rapidly fires much more powerful laser blasts that can pop Frozen Bloons, and deal increased MOAB damage.

upgrades.name: Plasma Accelerator
upgrades.description: Concentrates a powerful beam of energy to a single point.

upgrades.name: Ray of Doom
upgrades.description: Creates a solid line of annihilation. You can erase most Bloons at your leisure.

upgrades.name: Advanced Targeting
upgrades.description: Allows Dartling Gunner to hit Camo Bloons.

upgrades.name: Hydra Rocket Pods
upgrades.description: Shoots depleted bloontonium missiles that can damage all Bloon types and trigger multiple explosions.

upgrades.name: Rocket Storm
upgrades.description: Rocket Storm ability: Launches a powerful storm of rockets in a wide cone.

upgrades.name: M.A.D
upgrades.description: MOAB Assured Destroyer. Slower firing mega missiles deal extreme damage to MOAB-class Bloons.

upgrades.name: Powerful Darts
upgrades.description: Darts move faster, can pop frozen Bloons and can pop 3 Bloons each.

upgrades.name: Buckshot
upgrades.description: Shoots blasts of deadly buckshot instead of darts.

upgrades.name: Bloon Area Denial System
upgrades.description: 4-barreled auto-cannon that can be set to attack automatically.

upgrades.name: Bloon Exclusion Zone
upgrades.description: Upgraded to 6 barrels and massively increased damage. Bloons are excluded from existence.
